name: Sprint 8

team.name: team-lead
team.owns: arbitration, src/template content, ADRs, final approval

team.name: scribe
team.owns: work-tracking JSON, CONTEXT.md terms, Retro Loop

goal: Ship the grill-family split (PRD-010): settle the ADRs, build context-grill and epic-grill, wire docs, verify install-to-scaffold, and handle the upgrade/orphan path.

shipped.title: EXEC-091: Settle grill-family ADRs and rulings (writer-home taxonomy, seed-once edge, rename, format-doc homes)
shipped.summary: Author two ADRs (grill family keyed by writer-home; PHILOSOPHY seed-once edge on Retro-loop-as-sole-change-path with stamped sentinel detection), clear alignment on both, and record the four settled rulings (rename to execution-epic-grill, CONTEXT-FORMAT to context-grill, ADR-FORMAT to epic-grill, sentinel marker). HITL: the Team Lead authors and approves.
shipped.notes: Decisions already settled in the PRD-010 grill session; this item authors the formal ADRs and gates them.

shipped.title: EXEC-092: Add execution-context-grill skill — owns CONTEXT.md, seeds PHILOSOPHY once
shipped.summary: New stamped skill under src/template/.claude/skills/execution-context-grill/: SKILL.md + CONTEXT-FORMAT.md. Writes CONTEXT.md terms inline (term-by-term, don't-batch); seeds PHILOSOPHY.md only while the stamped sentinel is present; states its write-guardrail. Stamp + root mirror. package-qa + alignment gates.

shipped.title: EXEC-093: Reframe execution-grill-with-docs → execution-epic-grill (requirements + optional work-in-types pass)
shipped.summary: Rename the skill dir to execution-epic-grill. Rewrite SKILL.md: required requirements pass feeding execution-to-prd, plus optional work-in-types design pass (agent asks, defaults skip); type pass terminates on the semantic condition. ADR-FORMAT.md stays as canonical home. Drop glossary duty. Stamp + root mirror. package-qa + alignment gates.

shipped.title: EXEC-094: Wire grill family into PROCESS.md + CONTEXT.md; sweep every stale reference
shipped.summary: Expand PROCESS.md grill node (context-grill → epic-grill → PRD → issues) with the disk-handoff rule. Update CONTEXT.md glossary (Setup/Work Grill → grill family) and Format authority pointer. Repo-wide grep sweep for old skill name and format-doc paths — zero stale references. alignment gate. Src-First then root mirror.
shipped.notes: Scribe assists with CONTEXT.md term writes per roster.

shipped.title: EXEC-096: Upgrade path — migrate retires the renamed grill skill; doctor flags the orphan
shipped.summary: Extend migrate-policy to detect a stamped execution-grill-with-docs dir and retire it under a versioned migration id (idempotent, location-only, user-authored dirs untouched). Extend health-policy so doctor flags the orphan and names migrate. Temp-dir stamp-old → update → migrate test. package-qa gate.

shipped.title: EXEC-095: Rewire src/SKILL.md to the new grill layout and verify install→scaffold end-to-end
shipped.summary: Update src/SKILL.md lines 12, 22, 29: Work-Grill skill names and Setup-Grill format-authority paths point at the settled homes. package-qa proves the full path: npm install → SKILL.md → npx to-execution init stamps the grill family into a fresh Instance, all referenced paths resolve.

decisions.title: Grill family keyed by writer-home (ADR-0009)
decisions.summary: Three grills, each owning one artifact: setup-grill (scaffold/seeds), execution-context-grill (CONTEXT.md + PHILOSOPHY seed), execution-epic-grill (PRD/ADRs via requirements + optional type pass). The rename from execution-grill-with-docs to execution-epic-grill is a breaking consumer migration accepted at near-zero adoption.

decisions.title: PHILOSOPHY seed-once via stamped sentinel (ADR-0010)
decisions.summary: context-grill may append to PHILOSOPHY.md only while the sentinel '<!-- principles: unestablished -->' is present; the first established edit removes it. Positive in-file signal avoids the phantom-wipe failure class.

decisions.title: Format-doc homes follow writer-home
decisions.summary: CONTEXT-FORMAT.md to execution-context-grill (which owns CONTEXT.md), ADR-FORMAT.md to execution-epic-grill (the primary ADR producer). Cross-skill references by relative path.

decisions.title: migrate gains skill retirement; doctor gains orphan detection
decisions.summary: migrate detects and retires the orphaned old grill skill on existing Instances (versioned, idempotent, safety-checked against frontmatter). doctor flags the orphan and names migrate. Both verified end-to-end by package-qa.

retrospective_notes.title: Linter file-reverts silently undo edits on Bash error exit
retrospective_notes.body: A Bash command that exits non-zero triggered a linter/hook that reverted multiple edited files to their git state — silently undoing CONTEXT.md, PROCESS.md, README, cli.js, migrate-policy.js, health-policy.js, and execution-to-prd SKILL.md edits. The reverts were invisible until alignment gates read stale content and FAILed. Three alignment re-gates and one code-standards re-gate were needed. Workaround: avoid combining smoke-test Bash commands with '&&' chains that can fail partway; use separate commands or tolerate non-zero exits.

retrospective_notes.title: Alignment gates can read stale file content across re-submissions
retrospective_notes.body: Two alignment re-gates read stale file content from prior runs even after edits were re-applied on disk. The fix was explicit instructions to read fresh from disk. The root cause is unclear — possibly agent-level caching or the files being reverted between submission and execution.

retrospective_notes.title: Adversarial gap-hunt on retros added real value
retrospective_notes.body: The adversarial agent grounded in all 7 sprint retros found 3 P1 gaps (rename orphan, seed clobber, stale-name sweep) and 3 P2 gaps, producing EXEC-096 as a new slice and enriching acceptance criteria across 092/094/095. The phantom-wipe postmortem and the sprint-7 EXEC-083 contradiction were the two most productive retro sources.

retrospective_notes.title: Code-standards gate caught a real doc-comment splice bug
retrospective_notes.body: Inserting retireOrphanedSkill between migrateHookLayout's doc comment and its function body split the doc — the first half was prepended to the new function, the second half orphaned on the old. code-standards caught it as a truthful-comments violation.

step_log.artifact: EXEC-095: execution-grill-with-docs/ removed from src/template; src/SKILL.md updated to execution-context-grill / execution-epic-grill
step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. All EXEC-095 acceptance checks hold. (1) execution-grill-with-docs/ does NOT stamp: init writes 54 files with only execution-context-grill/ and execution-epic-grill/ in the skills tree. (2) framework-version.json contains zero paths under execution-grill-with-docs. (3) npm pack --dry-run shows zero execution-grill-with-docs entries (64 total pack files; 6 execution/* entries all under context-grill, epic-grill, to-issues, to-prd). (4) All SKILL.md path references resolve in the stamped tree (execution-context-grill/CONTEXT-FORMAT.md, execution-epic-grill/ADR-FORMAT.md, .excn/ docs all present; two glob/template patterns correctly excluded from literal check). (5) Cross-skill links all resolve (31 references checked, 2 glob patterns skipped). (6) Standard checks: idempotency 0 writes / 54 skipped; all JSON parses; .excn/.gitignore = '*_progress.json'; root .gitignore untouched; skip-safety holds; pointer wiring: both CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md created, sentinel visible text not HTML comment. (7) Migrate orphan path: seeded orphan execution-grill-with-docs/ at .claude/skills/; doctor reports ORPHAN naming migrate; migrate retires it and reports; orphan gone; second migrate is no-op; doctor reports 'current (no orphaned grill skill)'. Migrate contract (ADR-0008), EXEC-086 hook-command scope, EXEC-087 doctor hook-health, and update byte-identity all hold.

step_log.artifact: src/SKILL.md updated: execution-grill-with-docs refs replaced with execution-context-grill / execution-epic-grill; format-doc paths repointed; Work Grill renamed
step_log.summary: FAIL — 2 violations. (1) Manifest/extra: src/template/.claude/skills/execution-grill-with-docs/ still present on disk (3 files: SKILL.md, ADR-FORMAT.md, CONTEXT-FORMAT.md); init stamps it, making the stamped tree contain an extra skill directory that should have been removed as part of the grill-family split. (2) Pack parity: npm pack --dry-run confirms execution-grill-with-docs/ ships in the tarball (3 files listed). framework-version.json carries hashes under execution-grill-with-docs paths. src/SKILL.md itself has zero stale references (clean). New skills (execution-context-grill + execution-epic-grill) stamp correctly with correct files and all cross-references resolve. Idempotency holds (0 writes second init). All JSON parses. Gitignore correct. Pointer wiring not re-tested (no change). Fix required: delete src/template/.claude/skills/execution-grill-with-docs/ before resubmitting.

step_log.artifact: S8-4 + S8-6 combined: PROCESS.md/CONTEXT.md grill-family wiring + execution-to-prd SKILL.md Epic Grill rename + skill-retirement migrate/doctor (migrate-policy.js, health-policy.js, cli.js)
step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. All stamp contract checks hold across 16 distinct checks: manifest exact (57 stamped = 57 template, gitignore mapped un-dotted); idempotency 0 writes on second init; all JSON parses; .excn/.gitignore = '*_progress.json', root .gitignore untouched, pattern anchored under .excn/; skip-safety: pre-existing file preserved; pointer wiring: both created in fresh dir, pre-existing content byte-preserved with block appended once, second init no-append, --force does not change pointer files, deleted block re-appended, sentinel visible text not HTML comment, oversized AGENTS.md warns; migrate contract (ADR-0008): 4 runtime records routed to .excn/runtime/, 2 progress records to .excn/progress/, none remaining at base, byte-identical, idempotent no-op, clash skips and leaves home copy intact, doctor names legacy layout and migrate before + clean after, migrate exits 1 without .excn, records survive update byte-identical; EXEC-086 hook-command scope: clean hook renamed .js→.cjs and command repointed, modified+custom hooks left as .js with commands pointing at existing files (no dead commands created), interrupted prior run (cjs present, no js, command still .js) repointed correctly, fully-migrated instance no-ops; EXEC-087 doctor hook-health: dead custom command (push-guard.cjs missing) reported BROKEN with path, twin (spawn-guard both .js and .cjs) reported with invoked extension, live custom .js with command not flagged dead, healthy instance exits 0 with neither condition; skill retirement (ADR-0009/EXEC-096): init stamps execution-grill-with-docs/ alongside execution-epic-grill/, doctor reports ORPHAN naming migrate, migrate retires orphan and reports, orphan gone + replacement present, second migrate reports nothing to retire, doctor reports current; safety: dir with different frontmatter name (my-custom-skill) refused to retire with explanation; pack parity: gitignore ships un-dotted, both grill dirs in tarball.

step_log.artifact: execution-epic-grill rename (EXEC-093): skill dir renamed, SKILL.md rewritten, ADR-FORMAT.md retained, CONTEXT-FORMAT.md absent, context-grill cross-ref updated
step_log.summary: PASS — 0 violations. execution-epic-grill/ stamps SKILL.md + ADR-FORMAT.md; execution-grill-with-docs/ absent from stamped tree; CONTEXT-FORMAT.md absent from execution-epic-grill/; ./ADR-FORMAT.md link resolves; ../execution-epic-grill/ADR-FORMAT.md cross-ref in context-grill resolves; ./CONTEXT-FORMAT.md in context-grill resolves; framework-version.json carries hashes under execution-epic-grill paths and zero hashes under execution-grill-with-docs; manifest exact (7 skill files = 7 template skill files, 54 total stamped); idempotency 0 writes / 54 skipped; all JSON parses; .excn/.gitignore = '*_progress.json'; root .gitignore untouched.

PASS — 0 violations. All stamp contract checks hold: execution-context-grill/ stamps SKILL.md + CONTEXT-FORMAT.md; execution-grill-with-docs/ stamps without CONTEXT-FORMAT.md; relative link ../execution-context-grill/CONTEXT-FORMAT.md resolves; ./ADR-FORMAT.md resolves; PHILOSOPHY.md contains sentinel; framework-version.json carries hashes for new paths and drops old CONTEXT-FORMAT.md path; manifest exact (54 stamped = 54 template); idempotency 0 writes; all JSON parses; .excn/.gitignore = '*_progress.json'; root .gitignore untouched; skip-safety holds; pointer wiring holds (scratch creates both, pre-existing content preserved, second init no-append, block re-appended after delete, oversized warning fires); migrate contract holds (runtime/progress routing, byte-identical, idempotent, clash skips and preserves home, migrate exits 1 without .excn); EXEC-086 hook-command scope holds (clean renamed, modified/custom left as .js, every command points at existing file, interrupted-prior-run repoints, fully-migrated is no-op); EXEC-087 doctor hook-health holds (dead command flagged with path, twin named with invoking extension, live custom .js not flagged dead, healthy instance reports neither, exits 0 throughout); pack parity holds (new skill files present, old CONTEXT-FORMAT.md path absent); records survive update byte-identical.

PASS — 0 violations. Change is grounded in PRD-010 retro observation (Single-responsibility), records ownership-keyed taxonomy without coaching cognition, correct artifact type and location, conforms to all project philosophies.

PASS — 0 violations. Retro-loop-as-sole-change-path edge is justified: sentinel is a positive mechanical signal (not an emptiness heuristic), permission is append-only and expires on first established edit, safe failure mode routes to Retro Loop not a silent write. The Principle presupposes established content; the ADR defines the pre-condition, not a carve-out. Grounded in concrete retro observation (PRD-010 adoption-block). Single decision, correct artifact type and location, conforms to all project philosophies.

PASS — 0 violations. New skill owns exactly the shared-model writes (CONTEXT.md term-by-term, PHILOSOPHY.md seed-once, ADRs) with explicit write-guardrail; single responsibility clear after split from execution-grill-with-docs; no cognition coaching; seed-once sentinel is mechanical not prescriptive; CONTEXT-FORMAT.md move to writer-home is structure-preserving; cross-reference in execution-grill-with-docs updated correctly; sentinel line in src/template/.excn/PHILOSOPHY.md is a single mechanical addition; grounded in PRD-010/EXEC-092 and ADR-0009 (both previously gated). Conforms to all project philosophies.

PASS — 0 violations. Rename from execution-grill-with-docs to execution-epic-grill is grounded in PRD-010/EXEC-093 and ADR-0009 (writer-home taxonomy, both previously gated). Single responsibility: before had three write-targets (CONTEXT.md, PHILOSOPHY.md, ADR) plus requirements work; after owns only requirements shaping and optional design analysis, write-guardrail restricts to .excn/adr/ only. Ownership-not-cognition: two phases and four hole-finding moves are executable directives, not cognition coaching; termination condition is a mechanical checklist. Tied to real observation: traceable PRD-010 → EXEC-093 → S8-3 → ADR-0009. Src-First: target is under src/template/. Conforms to all project philosophies.

step_log.artifact: EXEC-094: PROCESS.md + CONTEXT.md grill-family wiring + reference sweep (7 files)
step_log.summary: FAIL — 1 violation. Structured-reference-docs / Minimalism: the proposed change installs _Avoid_: 'Work Grill' unqualified into CONTEXT.md and claims a complete active-reference sweep, but src/template/.claude/skills/execution-to-prd/SKILL.md and .claude/skills/execution-to-prd/SKILL.md (both listed as sweep targets) still contain 'Work Grill' unqualified in their frontmatter description (line 3) and body (line 6). The sweep is incomplete: the change introduces a glossary constraint it does not enforce in the named target files. Revise by updating both SKILL.md files to replace 'Work Grill' with 'Epic Grill' (or remove the unqualified usage) before resubmitting.

step_log.artifact: EXEC-096: skill retirement migration (src/bin/cli.js, src/bin/migrate-policy.js, src/bin/health-policy.js)
step_log.summary: FAIL — 2 violations. (1) Exported-function docs + Truthful comments: the JSDoc block above retireOrphanedSkill (cli.js lines 1230-1239) contains the first half of migrateHookLayout's old doc comment, cut off mid-sentence ('A hook with no marker record (untracked) or one that differs from its recorded hash (locally edited) is left untouched and') before pivoting abruptly to the EXEC-096 attribution. The prose does not describe retireOrphanedSkill. (2) Truthful comments: the migrateHookLayout doc block (cli.js lines 1266-1275) now opens with 'reported, never clobbered. Then repoint...' — a sentence fragment that is the severed tail of the previous function's doc, making migrateHookLayout's own purpose statement begin mid-sentence and contradict the function it documents.
